title: ‘Zootopia 2’ Artists on How They Made Gary De’Snake Empathetic by Softening His Eyes and Adding a Brow
summary: “Zootopia 2” introduces Gary De’Snake (voiced by Ke Huy Quan), a reptile whose home and community are destroyed by the evil machinations of the lynx family. His heroic actions — along with those of returning protagonists Judy Hopps (Ginnifer Goodwin) and Nick Wilde (Jason Bateman) —ultimately foil …
